mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_hobby_relation (id, user_info_id, user_id, hobby_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{userInfoId}, #{userId}, #{hobbyId})

INSERT INTO user_hobby_relation (id, user_info_id, user_id, hobby_id, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.userInfoId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.hobbyId}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT hobby_id FROM user_hobby_relation WHERE user_info_id = #{userInfoId} AND user_id = #{userId} -- 新增：userId条件，精准过滤
SELECT user_info_id FROM user_hobby_relation WHERE hobby_id = #{hobbyId}
